payload:
SCALE: macro only. GPU via ssh runpod. Read PROMPT.md for how to pick work. Read HYPOTHESES.yml, pick the lowest-priority open node with scale=macro and satisfied deps,  
  run the full cycle on RunPod, emit experiment.done. NEVER poll/sleep — nohup long jobs, move on. After integration, pick the next eligible macro node. If no macro nodes remain, generate
  2-3 new macro hypotheses. The loop never ends.

exp_reasoning_expert_distillation: GPU training launched on RunPod 4090. Phase 1 (training) running — 500 steps, ~108 min, ETA 18:21 UTC. Fixed dataset config (math_train) and TRL API (max_seq_length). 14.7GB/24.6GB VRAM. Phases 2-3 (eval) will run automatically via run_all.sh. GPU_BLOCKED: training running, ETA ~20:00 UTC for full pipeline.

exp_pilot50_held_out_eval: All prep complete — eval_mmlu.py (23 adapters x 38 MMLU subsets), eval_humaneval.py (code adapters), run_eval.sh orchestrator, MATH.md, PAPER.md template. GPU_BLOCKED: reasoning training at step ~104/500, ETA ~18:30 UTC. Launch queued after training completes. Budget ~$0.10 inference only.

exp_pilot50_held_out_eval: Design APPROVED by adversarial review. 3 fixes applied: (1) HYPOTHESES.yml kill criterion corrected to 'individual adapters', (2) non-independence + 0-shot limitations added to PAPER.md, (3) bootstrap CI + dedup win rate added to results table. Experiment ready to launch on GPU when reasoning training completes.

GPU_BLOCKED: exp_pilot50_held_out_eval approved+prepped, waiting on reasoning training (step 163/500, ETA ~18:10 UTC Phase 1, ~20:00 UTC total). Launch command ready in current_direction.md. Next eligible macro nodes: exp_attention_layer_orthogonality (P2), exp_relora_from_scratch_composition (P2).

No experiment ready for review (GPU_BLOCKED). Reasoning training at step 176/500 (~35%). Next eligible macro nodes with satisfied deps: exp_attention_layer_orthogonality (P2, dep exp_structural_orthogonality_proof=proven), exp_relora_from_scratch_composition (P2, dep exp_relora_composition_test=proven). Pick one and prep while GPU is busy.

exp_attention_layer_orthogonality launched on RunPod (CPU-only, parallel with GPU training). ETA ~18:40-19:10 UTC. Script: macro/attention_layer_orthogonality/run_attention_ortho.py. 50 adapters, d=3584, r=16, bound=0.0668. Reasoning training at step ~190/500 (~38%). Two GPU_BLOCKED experiments: this one (running CPU) and pilot50_held_out_eval (queued).

## Reason
max_runtime

## Status
Stopped at runtime limit.

## Summary
- Iterations: 6
- Duration: 5h 48m 26s
- Exit code: 2
